name: croptix
description: Browser extension that enhances Crunchyroll with quality selector and playback improvements
author: stratuma

scripts.pretty: bun run prettier src --write && bun run prettier static --write
scripts.dev:v2: bun run clean && bun build:manifestv2 && bun copy:public && bun run build:bundle && run-p build:watch webext:run
scripts.dev:v3: bun run clean && bun build:manifestv3 && bun copy:public && bun copy:static && bun run build:bundle && bun webext:run
scripts.build:v2: bun run clean && bun run pretty && bun build:manifestv2 && bun run build:bundle && bun build src/utils/bundle.js --outdir dist --minify && bun build src/utils/katamari_fix.ts --outdir dist --minify && bun build src/utils/katamari_fix_loader.ts --outdir dist --minify && bun run build:ts && bun run build:ext
scripts.build:v3: bun run clean && bun run pretty && bun build:manifestv3 && bun run build:bundle && bun run build:ext
scripts.build:bundle: bun build src/utils/content.ts --outdir dist --minify && bun build src/utils/katamari.js --outdir dist && bun build src/utils/config_init.js --outdir dist --minify
